features: vit release command: create GitHub Release + upload releases.json asset from current git tag
BaseContract: abstract foundation for all data contracts (versioning, enforce(), registry, serialization)
ContractRegistry: auto-registration via __init_subclass__ — no manual wiring
IContractPlugin: base for ABC/Protocol plugin contracts (ISemanticPlugin, IComprehensionPlugin, etc.)
IngestionContract: SourceDescriptor, IngestionQuality, NormalizedChunk, IngestionPayload v1.0.0
IIngestionPlugin: domain extension point for Perception Sacred Order
fixes: ReleaseRegistry: two-pass fetch — GitHub Releases API (Pass 1) + Tags API with Contents API fallback (Pass 2)
vit upgrade now discovers ALL pushed git tags (git push --tags is sufficient, no GitHub Release required)
vitruvyan_core.__version__ = '1.8.1' — get_current_version() no longer falls back to git-describe
documentation: All existing imports backward compatible — zero breaking changes

commits.message: fix(upgrade): reliable release discovery via Tags API + Contents API fallback
chore(release): bump to v1.8.0 — BaseContract + IngestionContract
